basics.name: P. R. Manjee, EE, MIS
basics.label: Digital Transformation & AI Readiness Strategist | Modern Workplace Consultant | Technology Enablement Leader
basics.summary: Digital transformation strategist with 30 years of experience guiding organizations through modernization, AI readiness, and practical technology adoption. Skilled at translating complex technical concepts into clear business value, aligning stakeholders, and improving workforce productivity through modern workplace solutions. Known for reducing transformation failure rates, improving collaboration, and helping SMB, mid-market, and mission-driven organizations adopt cloud, automation, and AI technologies in a sustainable, human-centered way.

work.name: MMR - Modern Workplace Consultant
work.position: AI Adoption Program Lead (Software Engineering Transformation)
work.summary: Led digital transformation initiatives across healthcare and business environments, focusing on assessments, modernization planning, and technology enablement. Guided organizations through AI readiness, workflow improvement, and adoption of modern workplace tools. Evaluated operational gaps and developed practical roadmaps that aligned leadership, staff, and technology teams. Keywords: AI adoption, context engineering, software development, prompt engineering, machine learning integration, workflow automation, developer training, engineering transformation.
highlights: Designed digital workplace solutions using Microsoft 365, Teams, and SharePoint to improve collaboration and reduce operational friction
Developed modernization roadmaps based on business, clinical, and IT assessments
Led change enablement efforts to support adoption of new tools and processes
Managed cloud migration and modernization efforts across multiple platforms
Evaluated emerging technologies including AI, automation, and digital tools to support organizational readiness
Improved cross-functional alignment by translating technical requirements into clear business outcomes

work.name: Cognesense
work.summary: Brought in as an external consultant to lead Cognesense’s on-site response after a ransomware attack exploiting a SonicWall router vulnerability. Tasked with mitigating the crisis, restoring operations, and building long-term resiliency within the IT environment. Keywords: Incident response, ransomware recovery, network security, SonicWall, cybersecurity architecture, business continuity, data recovery, forensic analysis, mitigation, team leadership.
highlights: Led cross-functional team through full incident response cycle, including threat assessment, system isolation, negotiation strategy, and coordinated recovery.
Designed and implemented technical playbooks for rapid incident response and infrastructure restoration.
Directed negotiations with threat actors and coordinated forensic containment efforts to minimize data loss.
Re-architected core information systems and implemented segmentation and monitoring frameworks to prevent future exploits.
Conducted team training on incident response methodology, containment, and post-breach remediation to strengthen internal capability.
Executed post-incident analysis to identify root causes and implement preventive measures.

projects.name: CONFIDENTIAL | Cybersecurity & Disaster Recovery Lead
projects.description: Brought in on a 30‑day emergency contract to help Cognesense recover from a severe ransomware incident caused by a SonicWall router exploit. I led an on-site technical response team to stabilize operations, isolate infected assets, and manage communications with attackers. I developed custom playbooks for network restoration, oversaw forensic data analysis, and guided negotiations to minimize damage. Once operations were stabilized, I re‑architected the organization’s systems to improve resilience and trained staff on incident response, reducing exposure to future exploits.
highlights: Led emergency response team after a ransomware attack exploiting a SonicWall router vulnerability.
Directed containment, negotiation, and recovery phases to restore uptime and secure data integrity.
Authored and implemented incident response playbooks and disaster recovery frameworks.
Performed full-system restoration and architected a hardened infrastructure to prevent recurrence.
Delivered team training on incident response methodology, threat mitigation, and resilience planning.

projects.name: MMR AI Adoption Program Lead (Software Engineering Transformation)
projects.description: Over a six‑month engagement, I was contracted to modernize the company’s engineering operations by embedding AI into their development lifecycle. The team had been experimenting with basic prompt-based coding (“vibe coding”), so I introduced structured context-engineering practices and reusable frameworks to maximize AI output quality. I built educational materials, delivered workshops, and implemented measurement systems that tied AI usage directly to measurable performance improvements. By project end, the team had adopted sustainable AI-driven engineering methodologies aligned with industry best practices.
highlights: Guided software engineering teams to adopt AI technologies for context-driven coding and development.
Transitioned workflows from ad hoc prompting to structured context-engineering frameworks.
Developed internal training modules for prompt engineering and model-driven project design.
Defined key performance indicators (KPIs) linking AI integration to productivity and code quality.
Advised leadership on ethical AI deployment, change management, and long-term strategic adoption.

Measured and reported efficiency gains, demonstrating a 28% improvement in knowledge worker capacity.
